_comment: Ground truth annotation for evaluation corpus. Fill in by reading the article.

article.title: Hydroxychloroquine and azithromycin as a treatment of COVID-19

study_type.notes: Open-label, non-randomized. Authors call it a 'clinical trial' but there is no randomization, no blinding, no allocation concealment.

consort_items._comment: For each CONSORT item: true = present in article, false = absent, null = not applicable or uncertain. Add 'notes' to explain your reasoning.

1a.notes: Title does not say 'randomized' but does say 'treatment' — partial

1b.notes: No structured abstract with standard CONSORT fields

2a.notes: Brief background on COVID-19 and chloroquine rationale

2b.notes: Objective stated: assess effect of HCQ on viral load

3a.notes: No trial design description, no allocation ratio

5.notes: HCQ 200mg TID for 10 days, +/- azithromycin described

6a.notes: Primary outcome: viral load at day 6 (PCR)

10.notes: No description of who enrolled or assigned

13b.notes: 6 patients lost (1 death, 3 ICU, 1 nausea, 1 left)

17a.notes: Viral carriage at day 6 reported per group

19.notes: Briefly: 1 patient stopped due to nausea

22.notes: Discussion of findings, but brief and one-sided

25.notes: Funded by ANR and IHU Méditerranée Infection
